name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG]"

---

## 🐛 Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Please describe the unexpected UI behaviour or layout issue.

## 📅 Environment Details
Please provide the version numbers and environment details below:

| Component | Version / Details |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Daveden Builderius Enhancements Version** | e.g., 1.0.2 |
| **Builderius Version** | e.g., 2.1.0 |
| **WordPress Version** | e.g., 6.4.3 |
| **PHP Version** | e.g., 8.1.2 |
| **Browser & Version** | e.g., Chrome 122 / Safari 17.3 (Crucial for CSS/JS) |
| **Operating System** | e.g., macOS Sonoma / Windows 11 |
| **Active WordPress Theme** | e.g., Twenty Twenty-Four / Hello Elementor |

## 🕹️ Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behaviour:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behaviour
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. (e.g., "The Builderius panel should slide out smoothly without overlapping the left sidebar.")

## ❌ Actual Behaviour
A clear and concise description of what actually happens. (e.g., "The panel overlaps the sidebar and the close button becomes unclickable.")

## 📸 Visual Evidence
Please attach screenshots or a short video/GIF demonstrating the problem. 
*(Tip: For UI enhancements, a screenshot of the broken element with the browser's Inspect Element tool open can be incredibly helpful).*

- **Screenshots:** [Drop files here or paste links]
- **Screen Recording:** [Link to Loom/Vidyard or file attachment]

## 💻 Browser Console Errors (If Applicable)
If the issue is related to JavaScript or UI interactions failing to trigger, please open your browser's developer console (F12 or Cmd+Option+I), replicate the issue, and copy-paste any red error messages here:

```text
[Paste console errors here]
